question_results.text: Will a penalty kick be awarded OR a red card be shown?

key_lessons: Biggest win: 20+ total shots (+21.58), a DIRECT/volume-based call.
Second-biggest win: Bruno Fernandes 2+ SOT NO (+27.17) -- correctly suppressed.

Q11 (Portugal 6+ SOT, +17.49) validates the specific lesson from pre-match research: Portugal's SOT ceiling should be anchored to their performance against organized opposition (Colombia, 2 SOT) rather than their Uzbekistan blowout (9 SOT) -- this held and won.
All 5 losses were small (largest -6.23) and mostly direct-market questions where the crowd landed marginally closer -- no systemic miss in this match.
